data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the room scan requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a room scan (360 camera view) but did not provide any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for a room scan but lacks specific evidence of how this is implemented or verified, leading to an inconclusive result. Without direct evidence of the room scan functionality, it is impossible to assert compliance with the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities related to room scan functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the room scan requirement.
